# Home Remedies Property Management & Real Estate

> Family-owned property management and real estate serving Westminster, Arvada, Thornton, Broomfield, Erie and the greater Denver metro since 2019. Full-service residential property management with transparent pricing and no-penalty, month-to-month management.

## About

Home Remedies Property Management and Real Estate Services is a family-owned company based in Westminster, Colorado, serving the north Denver metro. We manage single-family homes, townhomes, and small multi-family rentals, and also help clients buy and sell residential real estate. Our approach is owner-operated and personal: clients work directly with the people who manage their property.

- Phone: (720) 722-0357
- Email: homeremediespm@gmail.com
- Address: 3923 West 99th Pl., Westminster, CO 80031
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Founded: 2019
- Slogan: Where Excellence Meets Management

## Services

- [Property Management](https://www.homeremediespm.com/management.html): Full-service residential property management — tenant screening, leasing, rent collection, maintenance, and monthly owner reporting.
- [Buying & Selling](https://www.homeremediespm.com/buy-sell.html): Residential real estate services for buyers and sellers across the Denver metro.
- [Pricing](https://www.homeremediespm.com/pricing.html): Transparent management pricing with no-penalty, month-to-month agreements.
